task_completion.description: The item type for 'Roe v. Wade' has been changed to 'Case'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the reference manager's right-hand metadata pane, the 'Item Type' field should display 'Case' instead of 'Journal Article'.

task_completion.description: The Case Name field is correctly set to 'Roe v. Wade'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Case Name' or 'Title' field in the metadata pane shows 'Roe v. Wade'.

task_completion.description: The Court field is correctly set to 'United States Supreme Court'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Court' field in the metadata pane shows 'United States Supreme Court' (or 'Supreme Court of the United States').

task_completion.description: The Reporter field is correctly set to 'U.S.'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reporter' field in the metadata pane shows 'U.S.'.

task_completion.description: The Volume and First Page fields are correctly set to '410' and '113' respectively.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Volume' field shows '410' and the 'First Page' or 'Pages' field shows '113' in the metadata pane.

task_completion.description: The Date Decided field is correctly set to '1973'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Date Decided' or 'Date' field in the metadata pane shows '1973' (or 'January 22, 1973').

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the reference manager to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the reference manager application (e.g., Zotero) open with active selections and edits in the metadata pane, not a terminal or script.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual reference management software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a real reference manager, not a text editor or a mock UI where the expected answers were just typed out.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible executing sqlite3 commands or python scripts to modify the application's backend database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating metadata for the landmark Supreme Court case Roe v. Wade. Verified facts: Case Name is 'Roe v. Wade', Court is 'United States Supreme Court' (or 'Supreme Court of the United States'), Reporter is 'U.S.', Volume is '410', First Page is '113', and Date Decided is '1973' (or January 22, 1973). Accept these historically accurate variations if the agent inputs them, though the exact strings from the task description are expected.
